utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I can not wait to be with you !

emotion_cause.span: 1_I can not wait to be with you !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I will sneak over as soon as Ross picks up Ben .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I will just tell Rachel I am gonna be doing laundry for a couple of hours .

utterances.text: Laundry . Huh . Is that my new nickname ?

utterances.text: Awww , you know what your nickname is , Mr . Big
